alternative_document_options.label: Certificate of Registration
alternative_document_options.description: Official certificate issued by ACRA confirming the registration of the business entity.

alternative_document_options.label: Notice of Registration
alternative_document_options.description: The formal notification from ACRA sent upon successful business registration.

alternative_document_options.label: Passport
alternative_document_options.description: Valid international passport for identity verification of the business owner.

alternative_document_options.label: Singapore Driving License
alternative_document_options.description: Government-issued driving license showing the individual's full name and identity number.

alternative_document_options.label: Utility Bill (SP Services)
alternative_document_options.description: Recent utility bill from SP Group issued within the last 3 months for the business premises.

alternative_document_options.label: Tenancy Agreement
alternative_document_options.description: A valid and signed rental agreement for the registered business address.

alternative_document_options.label: IRAS Tax Assessment Notice
alternative_document_options.description: Recent correspondence from the Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore showing the business address.

alternative_document_options.label: Income Tax Notice of Assessment (NOA)
alternative_document_options.description: The most recent personal tax assessment notice from IRAS for the sole proprietor.

alternative_document_options.label: Management Accounts
alternative_document_options.description: Internal financial statements including Profit & Loss and Balance Sheet for the current period.

alternative_document_options.label: GST Return (IRAS)
alternative_document_options.description: Recent Goods and Services Tax filing submitted to IRAS for the business entity.

alternative_document_options.label: Letter of Authorization
alternative_document_options.description: A signed letter from the sole proprietor authorizing the account opening and designated signatories.

alternative_document_options.label: Power of Attorney
alternative_document_options.description: Legal document granting authority to an individual to act on behalf of the business owner.
